ead.archdesc:
======= RMM06763Robert J. Zehnder papers6763Compiled by RMC StaffDivision of Rare and Manuscript Collections
January 20082B Carl A. Kroch LibraryCornell UniversityIthaca, NY 14853rareref@cornell.eduURL:
agricThis finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on 2022-09-19 18:58:57 UTC.12/07/2018
This resource was modified by the ArchivesSpace Preprocessor developed by the Harvard Library (https://github.com/harvard-library/archivesspace-preprocessor)2007-05-29
converted from EAD 1.0 to EAD 2002 >>>>>>> 2e3ec5c57314077b8435567632a49d313357daab
English
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections
Robert J. Zehnder papers
Zehnder, Robert J.
6763
4 cubic feet. 4 cubic feet.
1957-2005 Undated Correspondence, Research Materials Correspondence, grape vouchers, and notes. Collection material in English 6068845
General
Contact Information:
Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections 2B Carl A. Kroch Library Cornell University Ithaca, NY 14853 (607) 255-3530 Fax: (607) 255-9524 rareref@cornell.edu http://rmc.library.cornell.edu
Compiled by:
RMC Staff
Date completed:
January 2008
EAD encoding:
Evan Fay Earle, January 2008
BIOGRAPHICAL NOTE
Robert Zehnder was an amateur viticulturist in Summerville, South Carolina who specialized in breeding "southern" grapes.
COLLECTION DESCRIPTION
Correspondence, grape vouchers, card file, research, and notes.
RELATED MATERIALS
Also see The Liberty Hyde Bailey Hortorium for grape hybrid vouchers, grape leaf pressings and notes from this collection.
Accession folder has photos of Zehnder, his grapes, and his vineyard. Some photos are on CD-ROM, also two video interview clips.
Forms part of the Eastern Wine and Grape Archive. (EWGA)
Cite As:
Robert J. Zehnder papers, #6763. Division of Rare and Manuscript Collections, Cornell University Library.
Titles taken from folders as labeled by Zehnder.
Grapes. Viticulture.
